properties.Soil Conservation (Lock and Spill Drains: Stone terraces and Lock and Spill Drains
properties.Observation: Vegetables are cultivated lands. Soil conservation methods have not been followed. Stone terraces are found in some lands.
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: For soil conservation in Vegetables cultivated lands, stone terraces,  Live hedges and  Leader drains should be constructed, It is ideal to grow perennial crops such as Pears and Tea
